productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Boat Sickline Blue Sports Shoes
description: The ideal outdoor shoe for fans and supporters of the adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championships, these men's adidas Boat Sickline shoes are lightweight and quick-drying with a multi-surface outsole for everyday usage. EVA tongue top and stretchable, step-in heel provide enhanced Fit. This shoe is designed for total practical performance in wet conditions without loosing one drop of style in the process. If you want your feet to turn heads, this Boat Sickline shoe from Adidas is for you. Upper Textile upper with synthetic overlays to give good shoe structure EVA tongue top for solid support Stretchable panel at heel for comfortable fit High-grip cord laces to give customised fit whatever the weather Midsole EVA molded midsole Outsole High-grip rubber outsole with Adidas Traxion to ensure you'll not miss a step, even in wet and slippery conditionsShoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
